reviews.comment:
Excelente estación. Baños limpios, gran variedad de productos, agua caliente gratis, servicio de inflado de cubiertas gratuito, excelente atención y con un parque atrás con juegos para niños, disponible para descansar un poco.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent resort. Clean restrooms, a wide variety of products, free hot water, free tire inflation, excellent service, and a park in the back with children's play equipment, perfect for a relaxing break.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkaFpYUjVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hace aproximadamente cinco meses mi hijo se olvidó en una silla del bar una campera, ayer, paro en esa estación y preguntó por la campera, sorpresa !! La tenían guardada y me la devolvieron, un gesto enorme de Calidad de Servicio, nivel humano y profesionalismo demostrado, agradezco la predisposicion de los chicos que estaban ayer martes 13 a la tarde, Gaston, Maria y el encargado, que hasta noté que se alegraron  Gracias, son un ejemplo

(Translated by Google)
About five months ago, my son left his jacket on a chair at the bar. Yesterday, I stopped at that station and asked about it. Surprise! They had it stored away and returned it to me. It was a tremendous gesture of service quality, human kindness, and professionalism. I appreciate the helpfulness of the staff who were there yesterday afternoon, Tuesday the 13th: Gaston, Maria, and the manager. I even noticed they were happy for me. Thank you, you are an example to follow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkbXVYN2FBEAE
